parsed.rationale: The visualization shows a range of kinematic pressure values from -800 to 800 m2/s2. The windshield appears to have a significant pressure difference, with the highest value near 800 m2/s2 and the lowest near -800 m2/s2, resulting in a difference of approximately 1600 m2/s2. However, considering the options provided, the closest and most reasonable estimate is 1250 m2/s2.
